Title: Technics Direct Drive Turntable System SL-1200G-S
Body (HTML):
The Technics SL-1200G-S is a reference-grade direct drive turntable engineered for exceptional rotational accuracy and vibration control. It features a coreless direct-drive motor with no iron core and advanced motor control technology for smooth, highly stable playback.

A three-layer platter with resonance-reducing deadening rubber and a four-layer cabinet with a hairline-finished aluminum top panel provide rigidity and vibration suppression. Each unit is factory-balanced using high-precision adjustment equipment for consistent performance.

The magnesium tonearm uses a traditional gimbal suspension and high-precision bearings for accurate groove tracking. Gold-plated phono terminals and internal shielding help preserve signal integrity. The SL-1200G-S supports 33-1/3, 45, and 78 rpm playback.

Key Features

  • Coreless direct-drive motor with no iron core
  • Advanced motor control technology
  • Three-layer resonance-controlled platter
  • Four-layer vibration-controlled chassis
  • Factory precision balance adjustment
  • Magnesium gimbal-suspended tonearm
  • Gold-plated phono and ground terminals
  • 33-1/3, 45, and 78 rpm support

Technical Specifications

  • Drive Type: Direct drive, manual
  • Speeds: 33-1/3, 45, 78 rpm
  • Wow & Flutter: 0.025% WRMS
  • Rumble: 78 dB (IEC 98A weighted)
  • Platter: Brass & aluminum die-cast, 332 mm
  • Platter Weight: Approx. 3.6 kg (incl. rubber sheet)
  • Tonearm: Universal static balance, 230 mm effective length
  • Power Supply: AC 120 V, 60 Hz
  • Power Consumption: 14 W (0.2 W standby)
  • Dimensions (W × H × D): 17-27/32 × 6-13/16 × 14-21/32 in
  • Weight: Approx. 39.7 lb
